summary: Admin Dashboard truth-based metrics testing complete. Backend: 41/41 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 tabbed sections (Executive, Growth Funnel, Reliability, Story Intelligence, Revenue) verified working with real DB data. All metrics display correctly with proper empty/no-data states.
critical_code_review_comments: admin_metrics.py: All 6 endpoints (summary, funnel, reliability, revenue, series, safety) use get_admin_user dependency for auth
admin_metrics.py: All metrics pull from real MongoDB collections - no hardcoded values
admin_metrics.py: Proper null handling with _safe_rate helper function for division
AdminDashboard.js: Auto-refresh every 15s with Live indicator toggle
AdminDashboard.js: Date range selector (7/30/90 days) properly updates API calls
AdminDashboard.js: MetricCard shows 'No data' for null values - proper empty states
AdminDashboard.js: HealthBadge component shows healthy/degraded/critical with color coding
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested with existing DB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard fully implemented with 5 sections pulling real DB data. Total Users: 33, Active Series: 1, Total Episodes: 4, Characters: 3, Continuation Rate: 16.7%, Avg Rating: 4/5. Growth Funnel shows 0s (correct - no growth_events tracked yet). Revenue is 0 (no payments yet). All navigation links (Users, Logins, Monitor, Audit, Health, Safety) are clickable.
